options.a: two lobes modulated in frequency by a 90 Hz and a 150 Hz signal.
options.b: a radiation pattern that is amplitude modulated by the VHF frequency of the ILS.
options.c: a 90 Hz lobe and a 150 Hz lobe that are amplitude modulated by the VHF frequency of the ILS.
options.d: a radiation pattern that is amplitude modulated by a 90 Hz and a 150 Hz signal.
